message:
Complete REPL implementation with all commands

Add list, refine, more, show, and export commands to the REPL:
- list: Browse tweets, likes, DMs, conversations, followers, following, blocks, mutes
- refine: Filter current search results by text
- more: Paginate through results
- show: Display full details of a specific result
- export: Export results as JSON or CSV

Add comprehensive unit tests (35 tests) covering:
- Command parsing for all commands and aliases
- List target aliases (dm/dms, blocked/blocks, etc.)
- Error handling for invalid inputs
- Prompt context formatting
- Text truncation helper

Part of xf-11.3.1 REPL core implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
